growing_seasons: Maha (November To December In Badulla District)
Yala (March To April In Badulla District)

pests.name: Bean Fly
pests.impact: Harms the crop from planting to harvest.

pests.name: Mite
pests.impact: Harms the crop from planting to harvest.

pests.name: Thrips
pests.impact: Harms the crop from planting to harvest and acts as a vector for Cowpea Yellow Mosaic Virus (HYMV).

pests.name: Whitefly
pests.impact: Harms the crop from planting to harvest and acts as a vector for Bean Golden Mosaic Virus (BGMV).

pests.name: Aphid
pests.impact: Harms the crop from planting to harvest and acts as a vector for Bean Common Mosaic Virus (BCMV) and Bean Yellow Mosaic Virus (BYMV).

pests.name: Pod Borer
pests.impact: Damages pods and harms the crop from planting to harvest.

diseases.name: Bean Common Mosaic Virus
diseases.impact: Infected leaves become mottled or turn yellow/golden.
diseases.solution: Immediately uproot and destroy diseased vines. Control vector aphids using recommended insecticides.

diseases.name: Bean Yellow Mosaic Virus
diseases.impact: Infected leaves become mottled or turn yellow/golden.
diseases.solution: Immediately uproot and destroy diseased vines. Control vector aphids using recommended insecticides.

diseases.name: Bean Golden Mosaic Virus
diseases.impact: Infected leaves become mottled or turn yellow/golden.
diseases.solution: Immediately uproot and destroy diseased vines. Control vector whiteflies using recommended insecticides.

diseases.name: Cowpea Yellow Mosaic Virus
diseases.impact: Infected leaves become mottled or turn yellow/golden.
diseases.solution: Immediately uproot and destroy diseased vines. Control vector thrips using recommended insecticides.
